# DeepTutor

> DeepTutor is an AI-powered intelligent learning companion providing personalized tutoring, adaptive learning paths, and interactive lessons for students.

Key characteristics:

- **Purpose**: Educational technology platform for personalized AI tutoring
- **Use cases**: Homework help, test preparation, concept mastery, interactive learning
- **Technology**: Agent-native AI system with adaptive learning algorithms
- **Features**: Personalized tutoring, step-by-step explanations, practice problems, progress tracking

## Features

- AI-powered personalized tutoring
- Adaptive learning paths tailored to each student
- Interactive lessons and practice problems
- Step-by-step explanations for complex concepts
- Homework help and test preparation
- Progress tracking and performance analytics

## Documentation

- [Homepage](https://tutor.intelli-verse-x.ai): Learn about DeepTutor's intelligent tutoring features
- [IntelliVerse X Platform](https://platform.intelli-verse-x.ai): User accounts and authentication

## Related Services

- [Quiz Platform](https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai): Interactive quizzes and assessments
- [QuizX](https://quizx.intelli-verse-x.ai): Advanced quiz platform
- [AI Chat v2](https://ai-chat-v2.intelli-verse-x.ai): AI chat assistance
- [IntelliVerse X Home](https://intelli-verse-x.ai): Ecosystem overview
